function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    "Channel",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    SUM("Sales Amount") / SUM(SUM("Sales Amount")) OVER () * 100 AS "revenue_share_pct",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Sales Order") AS "total_orders",
    COUNT("Sales Order Line") AS "order_lines",
    AVG("Sales Amount") AS "avg_line_amount",
    (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct"
FROM "Sales_Order" AS "so"
JOIN "Sales" AS "s" ON "so"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "s"."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE "Channel" IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
GROUP BY "Channel"
ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH YearlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "Sales_Order"."Channel",
        "Product"."Category",
        "Date"."Fiscal Year",
        SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue
    FROM "Sales"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
GrowthCalculation AS (
    SELECT
        "Channel",
        "Category",
        CAST("Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) AS current_year,

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "SELECT
    "SO"."Channel",
    "P"."Category",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") / SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit",
    AVG("P"."List Price") AS "avg_list_price",
    (1 - (SUM("S"."Sales Amount") / SUM("S"."Order Quantity") / AVG("P"."List Price"))) * 100 AS "realized_discount_pct",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") - SUM("S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
    (SUM("S"."Sales Amount") - SUM("S"."Total Product Cost")) / SUM("S"."Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" AS "S"
JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN "Product" AS "P" ON "S"."ProductKey" = "P"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "SO"."Channel", "P"."Category"
ORDER BY "SO"."Channel" ASC, "total_revenue" DESC;"}

Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
    "SO"."Channel",
    "P"."Category",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") / SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "revenue_per_unit",
    AVG("P"."List Price") AS "avg_list_price",
    (1 - (SUM("S"."Sales Amount") / SUM("S"."Order Quantity") / AVG("P"."List Price"))) * 100 AS "realized_discount_pct",
    SUM("S"."Sales Amount") - SUM("S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
    (SUM("S"."Sales Amount") - SUM("S"."Total Product Cost")) / SUM("S"."Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" AS "S"
JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN "Product" AS "P" ON "S"."ProductKey" = "P"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "SO"."Channel", "P"."Category"
ORDER BY "SO"."Channel" ASC, "total_revenue" DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH QuarterlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "SO"."Channel",
        "P"."Category",
        "D"."Fiscal Quarter",
        "D"."Fiscal Year",
        SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS revenue
    FROM "Sales" AS "S"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" AS "P" ON "S"."ProductKey" = "P"."ProductKey"

)

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql": "WITH ChannelRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "ST"."Group" AS "Group",
        "D"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
        "SO"."Channel" AS "top_channel",
        SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "channel_revenue"
    FROM "Sales" AS "S"
    JOIN "Sales_Territory" AS "ST" ON "S"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "ST"."SalesTerritoryKey"
    JOIN "Date" AS "D" ON "S"."OrderDateKey" = "D"."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
GroupYearRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "Group",
        "Fiscal Year",
        SUM("channel_revenue") AS "group_year_revenue"
    FROM ChannelRevenue
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
RankedChannels AS (
    SELECT
        "CR"."Group",
        "CR"."Fiscal Year",
        "CR"."top_channel",
        "CR"."channel_revenue",
        "GYR"."group_year_revenue",
        ("CR"."channel_revenue" / "GYR"."group_year_revenue") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "CR"."Group", "CR"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "CR"."channel_revenue" DESC) as "rank"
    FROM ChannelRevenue AS "CR"
    JOIN GroupYearRevenue AS "GYR" ON "CR"."Group" = "GYR"."Group" AND "CR"."Fiscal Year" = "GYR"."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year",
    "top_channel",
    "channel_revenue",
    "group_year_revenue",
    "channel_revenue_share_pct"
FROM RankedChannels
WHERE "rank" = 1
ORDER BY "Group" ASC, "Fiscal Year" ASC;"}

For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH ChannelRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "ST"."Group" AS "Group",
        "D"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
        "SO"."Channel" AS "top_channel",
        SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "channel_revenue"
    FROM "Sales" AS "S"
    JOIN "Sales_Territory" AS "ST" ON "S"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "ST"."SalesTerritoryKey"
    JOIN "Date" AS "D" ON "S"."OrderDateKey" = "D"."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
GroupYearRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "Group",
        "Fiscal Year",
        SUM("channel_revenue") AS "group_year_revenue"
    FROM ChannelRevenue
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
RankedChannels AS (
    SELECT
        "CR"."Group",
        "CR"."Fiscal Year",
        "CR"."top_channel",
        "CR"."channel_revenue",
        "GYR"."group_year_revenue",
        ("CR"."channel_revenue" / "GYR"."group_year_revenue") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "CR"."Group", "CR"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "CR"."channel_revenue" DESC) as "rank"
    FROM ChannelRevenue AS "CR"
    JOIN GroupYearRevenue AS "GYR" ON "CR"."Group" = "GYR"."Group" AND "CR"."Fiscal Year" = "GYR"."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year",
    "top_channel",
    "channel_revenue",
    "group_year_revenue",
    "channel_revenue_share_pct"
FROM RankedChannels
WHERE "rank" = 1
ORDER BY "Group" ASC, "Fiscal Year" ASC;"}
